meaning: n.时期,学时,节,句点,周期,(妇女的)经期adj.过去某段时期的int.没有了
examples: When did you last have a period ?
It was a period of intense activity.
The novel is set in the Roman period.
The 2001-10 period, therefore, was not typical but more like the 1930s and 1970s.
But more than 100 people died over the period in accidents involving on-demand flights.
